name: skirmish_3v3
description: A 3v3 skirmish with asymmetric starting positions and three distinct asset classes (rock is a heavy long-reach chaser, scissors is light and twitchy, paper is balanced). Attackers engage from a stand-off distance and strike with a directional kill cone; assets keep personal space from non-targets; a tighter body collision destroys both actors, and destroyed assets linger as hazards. Blue fields two rocks and a scissors under a greedy leader; Red fields two papers and a scissors under a seeded random leader.
